The following events took place in '''194 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The term "[[Spice/Legends|spice]]" gains widespread use.
*Birth of the [[Bab-Prime]] [[Language/Legends|language]].
*The [[Menahuun]] sneak into [[ORO Mining Station LM0228]] and create the community of Hua'Bal. {{Circa}}<ref name="R">{{GamerCite|7|Reckonings}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Academy: The Phantom Bully]]'' {{1st}}
